overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character walking through a desert landscape at night. The character travels alongside railroad tracks, encounters a passing horse rider, and continues along dirt paths toward distant rock formations under a starry sky.

events.description: character turns to walk parallel to the railroad tracks
train headlight beam becomes visible through smoke in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking alongside railroad tracks in the desert at night, moving toward a distant light

entered.detail: metal railroad tracks with wooden ties running parallel to the path
wooden telegraph pole with crossbars alongside the tracks
bright white headlight beam from distant train cutting through the darkness
smoke billowing upward from the distant train locomotive

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside railroad tracks in a dark desert at night. A distant train's headlight cuts through the darkness ahead, with telegraph poles lining the tracks. The ground is gravelly near the tracks with sparse desert vegetation.

events.description: moving away from railroad tracks onto open desert dirt path
sky clears revealing stars as the character moves away from the train smoke

agents.ego_description: walking away from the railroad into open desert terrain on a dirt trail

entered.detail: tall saguaro cacti silhouetted against the night sky along the trail sides
dark mountain range visible on the horizon under the starry sky

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the railroad tracks onto an open dirt trail, the sky opens up revealing stars. Saguaro cacti dot the landscape on either side of the path. The character continues into the open desert with mountains visible on the horizon.

events.description: horse rider appears in the distance ahead on the trail
rider on horseback passes by on the left side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as a mounted rider approaches and passes by

notable_agents.action: riding a horse toward the camera character on the trail

segments.scene_description: A horse rider appears in the distance ahead on the trail, approaching the camera character. The rider passes by on the left side, continuing in the opposite direction. The encounter is brief as the rider disappears behind the character.

events.description: large rock mesa becomes prominent in the distance ahead
slight curve in the trail direction as it winds through the desert

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the desert toward distant rock formations

entered.detail: large flat-topped rock formation rising prominently in the distance ahead
rocks scattered along the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along the desert trail toward large rock mesas in the distance. The landscape remains open and sparse with scattered boulders and cacti. The path continues straight toward the illuminated rock formations under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark desert night that transitions from the industrial linearity of railroad tracks to the vast openness of a mesa-filled wilderness. It begins alongside gravelly tracks lined with telegraph poles, where a distant train headlight pierces the darkness ahead. As the camera moves away from the rails and onto an open dirt trail, the sky expands to reveal a canopy of stars above a landscape dotted with saguaro cacti and distant mountains. The scene then shifts as a lone horse rider appears on the path, briefly passing the character on the left before disappearing into the night. Finally, the camera continues steadily forward across the sparse terrain, moving past scattered boulders toward towering, illuminated rock mesas on the horizon.
